title: User Interaction
description:
User-facing interaction layer — everything the user sees and touches. "Frontend" in the compiler sense: the input/output boundary, not "web frontend".

Two sub-systems:
- **Web UI**: React app, SSE event handling, task tree display, activity log, dark theme
- **CLI**: mxd command, send-and-exit, auth flow

Both are thin wrappers over the same daemon API. This domain owns web/CLI engineering problems — not every change that touches a frontend file.
